creator: vaxvaxcertph@gmail.com
text: The SIM Registration Act in the Philippines requires all mobile phone users to register their SIM cards to reduce crime and improve security. This law applies to both prepaid and postpaid users and includes both existing and new SIM cards. Here’s a quick guide on how to register your SIM: Visit the Website to register TM SIM - https://tmsimregistrationlink.org/
